channel.title: GitHub 热门日报
channel.description: 每天一份 GitHub Trending 中文精选

item.title: bojieli/ai-agent-book
item.description: 待翻译：《深入理解 AI Agent：设计原理与工程实践》（李博杰 著）开源主仓库：全书正文、编译版 PDF 与按章配套代码

item.title: tirth8205/code-review-graph
item.description: 待翻译：Local-first code intelligence graph for MCP and CLI. Builds a persistent map of your codebase so AI coding tools read only what matters, with benchmarked context reductions on reviews and large-repo workflows.
item.category: AI代理, 评估, 开发者工具, 可视化, 自动化

item.title: kvcache-ai/ktransformers
item.description: 待翻译：A Flexible Framework for Experiencing Heterogeneous LLM Inference/Fine-tune Optimizations

item.title: rohitg00/ai-engineering-from-scratch
item.description: 待翻译：Learn it. Build it. Ship it for others.

item.title: jamiepine/voicebox
item.description: 待翻译：The open-source AI voice studio. Clone, dictate, create.

item.title: KnockOutEZ/wigolo
item.description: 待翻译：The go-to web for your AI coding agent — local-first search, fetch, crawl & research over MCP. No API keys, no cloud, $0/query. Public beta.

item.title: andrewrabert/jellium-desktop
item.description: 待翻译：An unofficial desktop client for Jellyfin

item.title: github/copilot-sdk
item.description: 待翻译：Multi-platform SDK for integrating GitHub Copilot Agent into apps and services

item.title: PostHog/posthog
item.description: 待翻译：🦔 PostHog is the leading platform for building self-driving products. Our developer tools – AI observability, analytics, session replay, flags, experiments, error tracking, logs, and more – capture all the context agents need to diagnose problems, uncover opportunities, and ship fixes. Steer it all from Slack, web, desktop, or the MCP.

item.title: microsoft/terminal
item.description: 待翻译：The new Windows Terminal and the original Windows console host, all in the same place!

item.title: AstrBotDevs/AstrBot
item.description: 待翻译：AI Agent Assistant & development framework that integrates lots of IM platforms, LLMs, plugins and AI feature, and can be your openclaw alternative. ✨
item.category: 开发框架, AI代理, 模型/LLM, 编辑器插件

item.title: 1jehuang/jcode
item.description: 待翻译：Coding Agent Harness

item.title: trycua/cua
item.description: 待翻译：Scale computer-use 2.0 with open-source drivers, cross-OS fleets, and benchmarks for training, evaluation, and data generation.

item.title: MoonshotAI/kimi-cli
item.description: 待翻译：Kimi Code CLI is your next CLI agent.

item.title: Flowseal/zapret-discord-youtube
item.description: 待翻译：Flowseal/zapret-discord-youtube

item.title: codecrafters-io/build-your-own-x
item.description: 待翻译：Master programming by recreating your favorite technologies from scratch.

item.title: lyogavin/airllm
item.description: 待翻译：AirLLM 70B inference with single 4GB GPU

item.title: Canner/WrenAI
item.description: 待翻译：GenBI (Generative BI) for AI agents, an open-source, governed text-to-SQL through an open context layer that turns natural-language questions into trusted dashboards, charts, and SQL across 20+ data sources, such as BigQuery, Snowflake, PostgreSQL, ClickHouse, Amazon Redshift, Databricks and more.
item.category: AI代理, 开发者工具, 数据库, 可视化

item.title: PKUFlyingPig/cs-self-learning
item.description: 待翻译：计算机自学指南
